caption: A man wearing glasses, a white button-down shirt with a red bowtie, tan suspenders, and a tall, silver-grey pointed headpiece sits in a recording studio. He wears black over-ear headphones and is positioned in front of a professional black microphone. The background consists of a wall decorated with numerous small, framed photographs and a yellow "LEE" garment hanging nearby. On the left side of the screen, a logo for "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST" is visible, and a similar "BOSS TALK 101" logo appears on the right. Across the frames, the man remains mostly stationary, slightly shifting his head and facial expression while appearing to speak. His gaze remains focused forward, and the surrounding environment and equipment remain constant throughout the sequence.
